chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. S-443 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 5 alongwith reply as at ‘A’ 2. For order on CMA No.3822/2025 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case 08.9.2025 -------------------------------- None present for the petitioners. This was the position on the previous date of hearing. Though this is a freewill marriage case, but since nobody has bothered to appear and assist this Court, this Court is left with no option, but to dismiss this lis for non-prosecution. This petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE Zahid/*
